svg.title: Prompt Engineering Infographic
svg.desc: An educational infographic explaining prompt engineering techniques, with a central metaphor showing a human sending a prompt to an AI, six technique panels, a weak vs strong prompt comparison, and the footer "Better prompts = Better outputs".
svg.text: A visual guide for AI practitioners
Tell the AI who it is
No goal · No audience · No format
→ Result will be vague and unusable
→ Could be thousands of words or five
→ Use XML tags to structure complex prompts: <context>...</context>
→ Say what you do want, not just what you don't. Positive framing works better.
→ Temperature ≈ creativity. Precise tasks: low temp. Creative tasks: higher temp.
→ Longer ≠ better. One clear sentence beats five vague ones every time.
